_metadata.for_match: Orlando City SC vs Houston Dynamo FC
_metadata.match_time: TBD — Apple TV (confirm kickoff time before pipeline runs)
_metadata.notes: Pre-scan version. RESULT: Houston 4-1 El Paso (Open Cup R32, April 15). Lingr bicycle kick in 78 seconds (MLS Energy Moment of the Matchday). Bogusz (46'), Markanich (58'), Ponce (80'). PC Friday scan will update injury statuses and fill Orlando player Instagram verification. Guilherme stats still 5G/4A in 6 MLS appearances (Open Cup match separate). Orlando: 1-1-5, 13th Eastern Conference, lost 5-0 to Nashville recently. Away game for Houston — 'road warriors' framing applies. Next Open Cup: at Austin FC, May 21, Q2 Stadium.

matchday_hook: After the 4-1 Open Cup statement win (Lingr bicycle kick in SEVENTY-EIGHT SECONDS — MLS called it Energy Moment of the Matchday), the Dynamo take their good vibes on the road to Orlando. The Lions are 1-1-5 and struggling — just got 5-0'd by Nashville — and Houston is pulling up with momentum, Markanich chaos energy locked in, and Ponce with a point to prove after actually scoring on Wednesday. Guilherme is still the main character (5G/4A). Road trip energy is different. Away kit. New city. Let's go. ⚽🧡
vibe_strip_items: 🚲 Lingr bicycle kick in 78 SECONDS. SEVENTY. EIGHT. Energy Moment of the Matchday.
🧡 Houston 4-1 El Paso — we're in the Open Cup Round of 16, baby. May 21 at Austin FC.
🔥 Markanich scored on his chaos return debut. He said he would. He did. The legend continues.
😤 Ponce scored. Bogusz scored. The whole squad showed up. Fresh vibes for the road trip.
💜 Orlando City: 1-1-5. Lost 5-0 to Nashville. Houston is walking in with all the momentum.
🎡 Tincho Ojeda (Orlando DP) takes his family to Disney/Universal — the most Florida thing possible.
🤍 Duncan McGuire FaceTimes his brother Holden every single day. That's it. That's the wholesome content.
💯 Guilherme still 5G/4A in MLS — 3rd in all of MLS for goal contributions. Main character status: active.
🤍 Bogusz baby girl comes in July — every road game he wins is a step closer to being home for the birth.
🏆 Round of 16 at Austin FC on May 21 — the Texas derby energy is already building

hot_posts.description: Bicycle kick goal in the 2nd minute (78 seconds) to open the scoring vs El Paso. MLS named it 'Energy Moment of the Matchday.' Lingr delivered the cross assist — wait, no, Markanich crossed for Lingr's bicycle kick. The goal was pure instinct. Wife Lucie (@lucielingr) and son Tonda are the wholesome backstory.
hot_posts.caption_excerpt: Energy Moment of the Matchday — Ondřej Lingr, Houston Dynamo
hot_posts.why_its_hot: A bicycle kick in 78 seconds is a reel that writes itself. MLS already amplified it as Energy Moment of the Matchday. The man just delivered the most shareable goal of the week in round 1 of the Open Cup. @ondylingr is about to have notifications turned off.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 🚲 Lingr. Bicycle kick. 78 seconds. MLS literally gave him 'Energy Moment of the Matchday.' His wife Lucie and their son Tonda (short for Antonín — the most Czech name in history) got to see this one. The family keeps things quiet and wholesome while the goals are ANYTHING but. 💕⚽

hot_posts.description: Scored in his first match back after serving his 2-match ban (serious foul play vs Portland). He delivered the cross for Lingr's bicycle kick AND scored the third goal himself at 58'. The chaos agent returned and immediately contributed to two goals.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: He came back from a ban for the most chaotic red card foul (studs-up on the goalkeeper, refused to leave the pitch) and scored. He didn't just come back — he came back and delivered. The chaos-to-legend pipeline is real.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 🃏 Markanich served his suspension, came back, crossed for Lingr's bicycle kick, AND scored the third goal. The chaos man is officially a legend. Not a redemption arc. A victory lap. Houston wins 4-1 and he's in the middle of all of it.

hot_posts.description: Scored the second goal (46', opening of second half) vs El Paso. Wife Wiktoria (@wiktoria.wychowska) is expecting their baby girl in July. The workhorse scored at halftime on the eve of fatherhood.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Every goal Bogusz scores this season feels like it's for the baby. Wiktoria is expecting in July. He runs his heart out every game, scores, and you just KNOW he's going home to her after. The most wholesome subplot in the squad right now.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 🤍 Bogusz scored at halftime on Wednesday. His baby girl is coming in July. He runs every game like it matters — because it does. Wiktoria (@wiktoria.wychowska) has 24K followers and is very much the model Pilates instructor managing a pregnancy while her husband scores Open Cup goals. The Bogusz family is everything.

hot_posts.description: Scored the fourth goal (80') in the 4-1 win over El Paso. After concerns about his form (Charles noted low spark, compared to underperforming DP Ferreira earlier in season), Ponce delivered in the Open Cup.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The DP discourse was real. He scored. The discourse is paused — not over, but paused. One goal in an Open Cup match doesn't seal the narrative, but it's a step. Wife Martina has been on social media break since July 2024 — one of the most private couples on the squad.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 😤 Ponce scored. In a 4-1 win. The discourse is officially on pause. He's still finding his groove in MLS, but Wednesday was a step. Wife Martina stays fully off social (she's been on a break since mid-2024) so the content angle is all Ponce, all football. He's figuring it out.

hot_posts.description: Confirmed started vs El Paso (Open Cup). Didn't score in the Open Cup match but his MLS stats remain elite: 5G/4A in 6 MLS appearances, 3rd in all of MLS for goal contributions. 439K Instagram followers.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: He's the main character even when he doesn't score. 439K followers, Neymar in his DMs, MLS stats that put him third in the entire league for goal contributions. The brand doesn't stop for one match. And Orlando's defense has to figure out how to handle him on Saturday.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 💯 Guilherme didn't score vs El Paso but the squad won 4-1 anyway — proof this team is more than one player. In MLS? Still 5 goals, 4 assists, third in the league for goal contributions. 439K followers watching. Neymar tracking the stats from Brazil. The main character stays iconic.

hot_posts.description: Argentine Designated Player for Orlando City. Nicknamed 'Tincho.' Wife Oriana, son Benjamin. The family regularly visits Disney and Universal — they are living the full Orlando tourist experience while he's also their best player.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The Orlando DP is living his best Florida life with wife Oriana and son Benjamin at theme parks while also trying to keep their season from completely falling apart. The contrast energy is immaculate. Also re-signed through 2029 — he's not going anywhere.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 🎡 Orlando's Argentine DP is named Martín Ojeda — 'Tincho' to everyone who loves him. Wife Oriana and son Benjamin are regular Disney and Universal visitors while he does his day job of holding Orlando's midfield together. Signed through 2029. The most Florida footballer in MLS right now.

hot_posts.description: American striker (from Omaha, Nebraska) in a self-described bounce-back season after a challenging 2025. His younger brother Holden has Down syndrome — they FaceTime nearly every day. The bond is the main character content angle.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The FaceTime-every-day detail with Holden is the kind of wholesome content that gets shared outside of soccer circles. It's real, it's specific, and it's the kind of thing that makes you root for someone regardless of what jersey they're wearing.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 🤍 Orlando's American striker Duncan McGuire (@duncan_13) is in his bounce-back era after a tough 2025. But the storyline that keeps this man relatable? His younger brother Holden has Down syndrome — and they FaceTime nearly every day without fail. That's it. That's the content. The football is the day job.

hot_posts.description: Isybella competed on Beast Games Season 2 and has been posting about a fertility journey. Former elite triple jumper. Their toddler calls the Dynamo kit 'Daddy footy.'
hot_posts.why_its_hot: Beast Games + goalkeeper's wife + fertility journey vulnerability content + 'Daddy footy.' It's too many storylines in one person.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 📺 The goalkeeper's wife was on BEAST GAMES. As in the MrBeast show. On Amazon. She's also a former elite triple jumper and has been sharing a fertility journey with her followers. Their toddler calls the kit 'Daddy footy.' We can't make this up.

hot_posts.description: Baby girl due July 2026. Wiktoria is a Pilates instructor with 24K followers. @no13.pilates is her studio account. The pregnancy content is coming.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: July baby watch continues. Every away trip Bogusz makes, he's one match closer to being home for the birth. The stakes of every road game are: score, get 3 points, get home safe for July.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 🤍 Bogusz and Wiktoria's baby girl arrives in JULY. Every road game this season is one step closer. Wiktoria (@wiktoria.wychowska, Pilates instructor, 24K followers) is in full pregnancy mode while her husband is collecting Open Cup wins. July watch is ON.

hot_posts.description: Captain. Served suspension, came back, won the Open Cup game. 19-year anniversary tribute to wife Anne (@annesviat) posted during his ban. Back in full captain mode.
hot_posts.why_its_hot: The man posted a romantic 19-year anniversary tribute to his wife while suspended, came back, and won a 4-1 Open Cup game as captain. The telenovela arc (goal + own goal + red card + ban + wife tribute + return) is officially resolved. He's just the captain again.
hot_posts.suggested_tea: 😭💕 Sviatchenko posted a 19-year anniversary tribute to wife Anne while suspended. Then came back. Then won 4-1 as captain. The telenovela arc that had everything — goal, own goal, red card, suspension, romantic anniversary content — is resolved. The captain is just the captain again. 🫡

injury_flags.detail: Preseason knee injury. Has been OUT all season. 'Mid-April return' timelines proved false. Confirm status via PC Friday scan.
injury_flags.impact: Key CDM missing. Spine of the team continues to be depleted at midfield.

injury_flags.detail: Lower body injury. Was OUT for April 15 Open Cup. Confirm status for April 18 via PC Friday scan.
injury_flags.impact: Defensive depth issue. Madison Tayler (@madisontayler) moral support from stands.

injury_flags.detail: New lower body injury listed first time on Matchday 7 report. Was available for Open Cup? Status for April 18 needs PC scan confirmation.
2-match ban served. Played and SCORED vs El Paso on April 15. Full squad member.
injury_flags.impact: Forward threat confirmed — and chaos content is endless.

injury_flags.detail: Suspension served. Played as captain vs El Paso. Available for Orlando.

roster_changes.detail: No changes expected since April 15. PC Friday scan will confirm.

opponent_scouting.form_summary: 1-1-5, 13th in Eastern Conference. Just lost 5-0 to Nashville SC. Struggling badly. This is a winnable road match for Houston.
opponent_scouting.rotation_risk: MEDIUM — Houston has Open Cup R16 May 21 but still 2+ weeks away. Expect mostly full strength.
opponent_scouting.narrative: Orlando is struggling badly and Houston is riding Open Cup momentum. Away kit, road warriors energy. The Lions need a bounce-back; the Dynamo need MLS points badly (been in the lower half of the West). Inter&Co Stadium (Exploria) is the venue — a proper MLS stadium with real atmosphere even when the home team is struggling.

players_to_watch.name: Martín Ojeda
fun_facts: Wife Oriana and son Benjamin are Orlando theme park regulars (Disney, Universal)
Argentine creative playmaker — set-piece delivery, vision, goal threat
Was on MLS MVP watch list in 2025
players_to_watch.one_liner: The Argentine DP with the family living the full Florida tourist life — Disney visits, Universal, you name it. Wife Oriana and son Benjamin are regulars. Tincho is their best player and he knows it.

players_to_watch.name: Duncan McGuire
fun_facts: From Omaha, Nebraska — the most Midwestern MLS striker
Younger brother Holden has Down syndrome — they FaceTime nearly every day
Bounce-back season narrative after a challenging 2025
Tall, physical striker — leads the line with hold-up play
American player (no partner info found publicly)
players_to_watch.one_liner: The American striker from Omaha with the most wholesome backstory: his younger brother Holden (Down syndrome) gets a FaceTime almost every single day. The football is the side quest.

players_to_watch.name: Marco Pašalić
fun_facts: MLS All-Star in his debut season (2025)
Croatian international — played for Croatia against Colombia IN ORLANDO in March 2026
Signed from Rijeka as a DP
players_to_watch.one_liner: Croatian DP who was an MLS All-Star in year one AND played for Croatia in Orlando in March — literally played a national team game in the same city where he works. His personal Instagram TBD — PC scan to verify.

beat_writer_sources.author: Dustyn Richardson
beat_writer_sources.title: BCS — post-El Paso recap and Orlando preview expected
beat_writer_sources.key_takeaway: BCS typically publishes match recaps within 2 days of a game. El Paso recap should land April 16-17. Check before pipeline runs Friday.
